sentence: 他在酒吧里演奏了几首布鲁斯。
pinyin: Tā zài jiǔbā lǐ yǎnzòu le jǐ shǒu bùlǔsī.
english: He performed a few blues songs at the bar.

sentence: 农场里的小鸡跟在母鸡身后跑。
pinyin: Nóngchǎng lǐ de xiǎojī gēn zài mǔjī shēnhòu pǎo.
english: The chicks on the farm ran behind the hen.

sentence: 这个国家每年的军费支出很高。
pinyin: Zhège guójiā měi nián de jūnfèi zhīchū hěn gāo.
english: This country's annual military expenditure is very high.

meaning: 1. first thing in the morning; 2. at daybreak
sentence: 他清早就出门去买新鲜豆腐了。
pinyin: Tā qīngzǎo jiù chūmén qù mǎi xīnxiān dòufu le.
english: He went out first thing in the morning to buy fresh tofu.

sentence: 他死命抓住绳子，不敢松手。
pinyin: Tā sǐmìng zhuā zhù shéngzi, bù gǎn sōngshǒu.
english: He desperately gripped the rope and didn't dare let go.

meaning: 1. to send on assignment; 2. to deploy (troops)
sentence: 公司调派他去上海分部工作。
pinyin: Gōngsī diàopài tā qù Shànghǎi fēnbù gōngzuò.
english: The company sent him on assignment to the Shanghai branch.

sentence: 他每天通勤需要花将近一个小时。
pinyin: Tā měitiān tōngqín xūyào huā jiāngjìn yī gè xiǎoshí.
english: His daily commute takes nearly an hour.

sentence: 新上任的总编辑决定改版报纸。
pinyin: Xīn shàngrèn de zǒng biānjí juédìng gǎibǎn bàozhǐ.
english: The newly appointed chief editor decided to redesign the newspaper.

meaning: 1. to release on bail; 2. to bail
sentence: 他交了保证金后获得保释。
pinyin: Tā jiāo le bǎozhèngjīn hòu huòdé bǎoshì.
english: He was released on bail after paying the deposit.

sentence: 他们两个异地恋已经坚持三年了。
pinyin: Tāmen liǎng gè yìdì liàn yǐjīng jiānchí sān nián le.
english: The two of them have maintained a long-distance relationship for three years.

sentence: 在某些国家，持枪需要申请专门的许可证。
pinyin: Zài mǒuxiē guójiā, chíqiāng xūyào shēnqǐng zhuānmén de xǔkězhèng.
english: In some countries, carrying a gun requires applying for a special license.

sentence: 金属传热快，所以锅把容易变烫。
pinyin: Jīnshǔ chuánrè kuài, suǒyǐ guō bǎ róngyì biàn tàng.
english: Metal conducts heat quickly, which is why pot handles get hot easily.

sentence: 她毕业于北大法学院，现在做律师。
pinyin: Tā bìyè yú Běidà fǎxuéyuàn, xiànzài zuò lǜshī.
english: She graduated from Peking University's law school and is now a lawyer.

meaning: to beat (sb or sth) into (a certain condition); to denounce (sb) as (s
sentence: 两队打成平手，需要加赛决出胜负。
pinyin: Liǎng duì dǎ chéng píngshǒu, xūyào jiā sài juéchū shèngfù.
english: The two teams ended in a draw, so an extra round is needed to determine the winner.

sentence: 韩流已经影响到了整个东亚文化圈。
pinyin: Hánliú yǐjīng yǐngxiǎng dàole zhěnggè Dōngyà wénhuà quān.
english: The Korean Wave has already influenced the entire East Asian cultural sphere.

meaning: to order; to enjoin; to charge; to instruct sb to finish sth
sentence: 监管部门责令该公司限期整改。
pinyin: Jiānguǎn bùmén zélìng gāi gōngsī xiàn qī zhěnggǎi.
english: The regulatory authority ordered the company to make corrections within a set deadline.

meaning: hairy fellow; foreigner; Russian (derog.); bandit (old); tuft of fine
sentence: 他用'毛子'这个词称呼俄国人，听起来不太礼貌。
pinyin: Tā yòng 'máozi' zhège cí chēnghu Éguó rén, tīng qǐlái bù tài lǐmào.
english: He used the term 'máozi' to refer to Russians, which sounds rather impolite.

meaning: member of the House of Representatives
sentence: 她当选了众议员，成为该地区最年轻的议员。
pinyin: Tā dāngxuǎnle zhòng yìyuán, chéngwéi gāi dìqū zuì niánqīng de yìyuán.
english: She was elected as a House Representative, becoming the youngest legislator in the district.

meaning: to act naturally, authentically and spontaneously (whether seen as adm
sentence: 他是个率性的人，想说什么就说什么。
pinyin: Tā shì gè shuàixìng de rén, xiǎng shuō shénme jiù shuō shénme.
english: He's the kind of person who acts on impulse — he just says whatever comes to mind.

meaning: In general, generally speaking; Generally speaking
sentence: 一般来说，早睡早起对身体好。
pinyin: Yì bān lái shuō, zǎo shuì zǎo qǐ duì shēntǐ hǎo.
english: Generally speaking, going to bed early and getting up early is good for your health.

sentence: 第一次上台演讲，不免有些紧张。
pinyin: Dì yī cì shàngtái yǎnjiǎng, bù miǎn yǒuxiē jǐnzhāng.
english: It's inevitable to feel a bit nervous the first time you give a speech on stage.

sentence: 公园里的草坪上坐满了人。
pinyin: Gōngyuán lǐ de cǎopíng shàng zuò mǎn le rén.
english: The lawn in the park was full of people sitting around.

sentence: 爸爸每个月都能领到退休金。
pinyin: Bàba měi ge yuè dōu néng lǐng dào tuì xiū jīn.
english: Dad receives his pension every month.

sentence: 她每天练习小提琴练了一个小时。
pinyin: Tā měitiān liànxí xiǎotíqín liànle yī gè xiǎoshí.
english: She practices the violin for one hour every day.

meaning: 1. to settle; 2. to set up home
sentence: 他们决定在成都落户。
pinyin: Tāmen juédìng zài Chéngdū luò hù.
english: They decided to settle down in Chengdu.

sentence: 核能是一种低碳的发电方式。
pinyin: Hé néng shì yī zhǒng dī tàn de fā diàn fāng shì.
english: Nuclear energy is a low-carbon way of generating electricity.

sentence: 听到这首老歌，她开始怀旧了。
pinyin: Tīng dào zhè shǒu lǎo gē, tā kāishǐ huáijiù le.
english: Hearing this old song, she started feeling nostalgic.

sentence: 只有极少数人有机会见到他本人。
pinyin: Zhǐ yǒu jí shǎo shù rén yǒu jī huì jiàn dào tā běn rén.
english: Only an extremely small number of people have had the chance to meet him in person.

sentence: 南方今年发生了严重的水灾。
pinyin: Nán fāng jīn nián fā shēng le yán zhòng de shuǐ zāi.
english: The south experienced a serious flood this year.

meaning: 1. to collect money; 2. to raise funds
sentence: 学校为贫困生筹集了一批助学资金。
pinyin: Xuéxiào wèi pínkùn shēng chóují le yī pī zhùxué zījīn.
english: The school raised a batch of scholarship funds for students in need.

meaning: 1. that very night; 2. through the night; 3. for several nights in a r
sentence: 接到通知后，他们连夜赶往出事地点。
pinyin: Jiē dào tōng zhī hòu, tā men lián yè gǎn wǎng chū shì dì diǎn.
english: After receiving the notice, they rushed to the scene that very night.

sentence: 他去医院挂了一个门诊号。
pinyin: Tā qù yīyuàn guà le yī gè ménzhěn hào.
english: He went to the hospital and registered for an outpatient appointment.

sentence: 这张优惠券的有效期只到本月底。
pinyin: Zhè zhāng yōu huì quàn de yǒu xiào qī zhǐ dào běn yuè dǐ.
english: This coupon's validity period only lasts until the end of this month.

sentence: 远处的雪山在阳光下闪闪发光。
pinyin: Yuǎnchù de xuěshān zài yángguāng xià shǎnshǎn fāguāng.
english: The snow-capped mountains in the distance glittered in the sunlight.

meaning: to hand it (i.e. the aforementioned item) to (sb)
sentence: 她把菜单递给了旁边的客人。
pinyin: Tā bǎ càidān dì gěi le pángbiān de kèrén.
english: She handed the menu to the guest beside her.

sentence: 洗衣机坏了，衣服只能手洗。
pinyin: Xǐyījī huài le, yīfu zhǐ néng shǒu xǐ.
english: The washing machine broke, so clothes can only be washed by hand.

sentence: 钥匙就放在桌子的抽屉里。
pinyin: Yàoshi jiù fàng zài zhuōzi de chōuti lǐ.
english: The key is in the desk drawer.

sentence: 这里的旅游业近年来蓬勃发展。
pinyin: Zhèlǐ de lǚyóuyè jìn nián lái péngbó fāzhǎn.
english: The tourism industry here has been flourishing in recent years.

sentence: 他工作表现出色，老板决定给他加薪。
pinyin: Tā gōngzuò biǎoxiàn chūsè, lǎobǎn juédìng gěi tā jiāxīn.
english: His performance was outstanding, so the boss decided to give him a raise.

sentence: 爷爷一辈子都在耕种这片土地。
pinyin: Yéye yī bèizi dōu zài gēngzhòng zhè piàn tǔdì.
english: Grandpa spent his whole life cultivating this land.

sentence: 运动前喝一杯高能量饮料提提神。
pinyin: Yùndòng qián hē yī bēi gāo néngliàng yǐnliào tí ti shén.
english: Have a high-energy drink before exercising to boost your energy.

sentence: 这部电影大部分情节都符合史实。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng dàbùfen qíngjié dōu fúhé shǐshí.
english: Most of the plot in this film is consistent with historical facts.

sentence: 这首歌的副歌部分特别容易上口。
pinyin: Zhè shǒu gē de fùgē bùfen tèbié róngyì shàngkǒu.
english: The chorus of this song is especially catchy.

sentence: 历史课讲到了俄国沙皇的统治时期。
pinyin: Lìshǐ kè jiǎng dào le Éguó shāhuáng de tǒngzhì shíqī.
english: The history class covered the period of Czarist rule in Russia.

meaning: 1. collection of pictures; 2. atlas; 3. CL:本[běn],部[bù]
sentence: 图书馆里有一本精美的世界地理图集。
pinyin: Túshūguǎn lǐ yǒu yī běn jīngměi de shìjiè dìlǐ tújí.
english: There is a beautiful world geography atlas in the library.

meaning: 1. to establish; 2. to found; 3. to create (a good environment)
sentence: 学校创设了一个专门的阅读角。
pinyin: Xuéxiào chuàngshè le yī gè zhuānmén de yuèdú jiǎo.
english: The school established a dedicated reading corner.

sentence: 我昨天去银行开户，很顺利。
pinyin: Wǒ zuótiān qù yínháng kāihù, hěn shùnlì.
english: I went to the bank yesterday to open an account and it went smoothly.

sentence: 科研团队终于攻克了这道技术难题。
pinyin: Kēyán tuánduì zhōngyú gōngkè le zhè dào jìshù nántí.
english: The research team finally solved this technical challenge.

sentence: 听说宠物狗去世了，她心碎极了。
pinyin: Tīng shuō chǒngwù gǒu qùshì le, tā xīnsuì jí le.
english: When she heard her pet dog had passed away, she was heartbroken.

meaning: 1. to carry; 2. to convey; 3. delivery; 4. supply
sentence: 这艘船能运载两百名乘客。
pinyin: Zhè sōu chuán néng yùnzài liǎng bǎi míng chéngkè.
english: This ship can carry two hundred passengers.
